title: Rod opsin sequence in the John Dory: further evidence for the spectral tuning of rhodopsin
abstract: The opsin from the John Dory Zeus faber rod visual pigment (maximum spectral sensitivity =492 nm) was cloned and sequenced. Comparison of the John Dory rod opsin sequence with those from other fish with blue‐shifted scotopic spectral sensitivity provides further evidence for the spectral tuning of this group of visual pigments.
